title: Smoky Salmon Soup
description: A hearty and flavorful soup made with smoky salmon, peppery vegetables, and Japanese spices.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add chopped scallions and cook until softened, 3-4 minutes.
Add miso paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add vegetable broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add Japanese rice and cook until tender, 10-12 minutes.
Add smoky salmon fillets and cook until cooked through, 5-7 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional scallions if desired.
